Uses of Package
org.moeaframework.core.comparator

Packages that use org.moeaframework.core.comparator
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.comparator
Contains dominance comparators and other comparators used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.
org.moeaframework.core.selection
Package of various selection operators.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.core.comparator used by org.moeaframework.algorithm
    Class
    Description
    DominanceComparator
    Interface for comparing two solutions using a dominance relation.

    Class
    Description
    DominanceComparator
    Interface for comparing two solutions using a dominance relation.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.core.comparator used by org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
    Class
    Description
    ChainedComparator
    Applies any number of comparators in succession, returning the result from the first comparator producing a non-zero return value.
    DominanceComparator
    Interface for comparing two solutions using a dominance relation.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.core.comparator used by org.moeaframework.core
    Class
    Description
    DominanceComparator
    Interface for comparing two solutions using a dominance relation.
    EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator
    Compares two solutions using aggregate constraint violations and the additive ε-box objective comparator.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.core.comparator used by org.moeaframework.core.comparator
    Class
    Description
    ChainedComparator
    Applies any number of comparators in succession, returning the result from the first comparator producing a non-zero return value.
    DominanceComparator
    Interface for comparing two solutions using a dominance relation.
    EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator
    Compares two solutions using the additive ε-box objective comparator.

    Class
    Description
    DominanceComparator
    Interface for comparing two solutions using a dominance relation.
    FitnessComparator
    Compares two solutions based on their fitness value.

    Description

    Compares two solutions using aggregate constraint violations and the additive ε-box objective comparator.
